explanation: The command omits quotes around dumpbin.exe, which is still valid and accepted by the Windows command interpreter. This simulates a safe mutation technique by reordering and omitting unnecessary syntax.
The command uses quotes around dumpbin.exe, which is a valid insertion technique. This demonstrates how the command can be altered while maintaining its functionality.
The command substitutes /EXPORTS with /EX, which is a valid short form of the same option in dumpbin.exe. This demonstrates substitution as a safe mutation technique.
The command adds a colon after /EXPORTS, which is a valid syntax variation accepted by dumpbin.exe. This demonstrates insertion as a safe mutation technique.
